# robots.txt for 再漫画日漫站 (manhua.zaimanhua.com)
# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html
# 最后更新: 2026-05-20

# ===========================================
# 默认规则 - 允许所有搜索引擎
# ===========================================
User-agent: *

# 允许抓取的主要内容页面
Allow: /
Allow: /index
Allow: /details/
Allow: /detail/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /view2/
Allow: /newauthor/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /dynamic/
Allow: /teenage-list/
Allow: /disclaimer/
Allow: /info/

# 禁止抓取 - 用户私有页面
Disallow: /dingyue/

# 禁止抓取 - 预览和测试页面
Disallow: /localpriviews/
Disallow: /priviews/

# 禁止抓取 - API 路径
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /app/
Disallow: /ipi/
Disallow: /tpi/
Disallow: /cpi/
Disallow: /npi/
Disallow: /newpi/
Disallow: /lpi/

# 禁止抓取 - 静态资源和系统文件
Disallow: /fridge-account/
Disallow: /_nuxt/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.js$
Disallow: /*.css$

# 抓取延迟（秒）- 保护服务器
Crawl-delay: 1

# ===========================================
# 百度蜘蛛 - 中国主要搜索引擎
# ===========================================
User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /
Allow: /details/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /rank/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /tags/
Allow: /author/
Allow: /info/
Disallow: /dingyue/
Disallow: /uploads/
Disallow: /uploadShows/
Disallow: /localpriviews/
Disallow: /priviews/
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 1

# ===========================================
# 百度图片蜘蛛
# ===========================================
User-agent: Baiduspider-image
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# ===========================================
# 谷歌蜘蛛
# ===========================================
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Allow: /details/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /rank/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /author/
Allow: /info/
Disallow: /dingyue/
Disallow: /uploadShows/
Disallow: /localpriviews/
Disallow: /priviews/
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 1

# ===========================================
# 谷歌图片蜘蛛
# ===========================================
User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

# ===========================================
# 必应蜘蛛
# ===========================================
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Allow: /details/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /tags/
Allow: /info/
Disallow: /dingyue/
Disallow: /uploadShows/
Disallow: /localpriviews/
Disallow: /priviews/
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 1

# ===========================================
# 搜狗蜘蛛
# ===========================================

Allow: /
Allow: /details/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /tags/
Allow: /author/
Allow: /info/
Disallow: /dingyue/
Disallow: /uploads/
Disallow: /uploadShows/
Disallow: /localpriviews/
Disallow: /priviews/
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 1

# ===========================================
# 360蜘蛛
# ===========================================
User-agent: 360Spider
Allow: /
Allow: /details/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /tags/
Allow: /author/
Allow: /info/
Disallow: /dingyue/
Disallow: /uploadShows/
Disallow: /localpriviews/
Disallow: /priviews/
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 1

# ===========================================
# 神马搜索蜘蛛（移动端）
# ===========================================
User-agent: YisouSpider
Allow: /
Allow: /details/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /tags/
Allow: /author/
Allow: /info/
Disallow: /dingyue/
Disallow: /uploadShows/
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 1

# ===========================================
# 头条搜索蜘蛛
# ===========================================
User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /
Allow: /details/
Allow: /view/
Allow: /update/
Allow: /tags/
Allow: /author/
Allow: /info/
Disallow: /dingyue/
Disallow: /uploads/
Disallow: /uploadShows/
Disallow: /api/
Crawl-delay: 2

# ===========================================
# 禁止恶意爬虫和SEO分析工具
# ===========================================
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: DataForSeoBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: PetalBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Disallow: /

# ===========================================
# AI 爬虫（可根据需要调整）
# ===========================================
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /

# ===========================================
# 站点地图
# ===========================================
Sitemap: https://manhua.zaimanhua.com/sitemap.xml

# ===========================================
# Host 声明（可选，部分搜索引擎支持）
# ===========================================
Host: https://manhua.zaimanhua.com
